CVE-2024-28882.title: OpenVPN from 2.6.0 through 2.6.10 in a server role accepts multip ...
CVE-2024-28882.description: OpenVPN from 2.6.0 through 2.6.10 in a server role accepts multiple exit notifications from authenticated clients which will extend the validity of a closing session

CVE-2024-5594.title: OpenVPN before 2.6.11 does not santize PUSH_REPLY messages proper ...
CVE-2024-5594.description: OpenVPN before 2.6.11 does not santize PUSH_REPLY messages properly which an attacker controlling the server can use to inject unexpected arbitrary data ending up in client logs.

CVE-2025-13086.title: Improper validation of source IP addresses in OpenVPN version 2.6 ...
CVE-2025-13086.description: Improper validation of source IP addresses in OpenVPN version 2.6.0 through 2.6.15 and 2.7_alpha1 through 2.7_rc1 allows an attacker to open a session from a different IP address which did not initiate the connection resulting in a denial of service for the originating client

CVE-2025-13751.title: Interactive service agent in OpenVPN version 2.5.0 through 2.6.16 ...
CVE-2025-13751.description: Interactive service agent in OpenVPN version 2.5.0 through 2.6.16 and 2.7_alpha1 through 2.7_rc2 on Windows allows a local authenticated user to connect to the service and trigger an error causing a local denial of service.

CVE-2025-2704.title: OpenVPN version 2.6.1 through 2.6.13 in server mode using TLS-cry ...
CVE-2025-2704.description: OpenVPN version 2.6.1 through 2.6.13 in server mode using TLS-crypt-v2 allows remote attackers to trigger a denial of service by corrupting and replaying network packets in the early handshake phase
